title: An Act to advance hate-crime protections for victims who are targeted due to their gender

abstracts.abstract: By Representative DuBois of Brockton, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 1675) of Michelle M. DuBois relative to hate-crime protections for victims targeted due to gender.  The Judiciary.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on The Judiciary
